member.name: T:Armada.Runtimes.AgentRuntimeFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating agent runtime instances.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.AgentRuntimeFactory.#ctor(SyslogLogging.LoggingModule)
member.summary: Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.AgentRuntimeFactory.Create(Armada.Core.Enums.AgentRuntimeEnum)
member.summary: Create an agent runtime by type.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.AgentRuntimeFactory.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Create a custom agent runtime by name.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.AgentRuntimeFactory.Register(System.String,System.Func{Armada.Runtimes.Interfaces.IAgentRuntime})
member.summary: Register a custom runtime factory.
member.param: Factory function to create the runtime.

member.name: T:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime
member.summary: Base implementation for agent runtimes with common process management.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.Name
member.summary: Runtime display name.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.SupportsResume
member.summary: Whether this runtime supports session resume.

member.name: E:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.OnOutputReceived
member.summary: Event raised when the agent writes a line to stdout.

member.name: E:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.OnProcessStarted
member.summary: Event raised immediately after the agent process starts and a PID is available.

member.name: E:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.OnProcessExited
member.summary: Event raised when the agent process exits. Parameters: processId, exitCode (null if unavailable).

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.#ctor(SyslogLogging.LoggingModule)
member.summary: Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.StartAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start an agent process.
member.param: Optional path to write agent stdout/stderr output.
Optional path to write the agent's final response artifact.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.StopAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stop an agent process gracefully.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.BuildArguments(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Build runtime-specific command-line arguments.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.IsRunningAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if a process is still running.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.GetCommand
member.summary: Get the command to execute for this runtime.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.UsePromptStdin
member.summary: Whether the runtime expects the prompt to be written to stdin instead of passed as a CLI argument.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.ApplyEnvironment(System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo)
member.summary: Apply runtime-specific environment variables to the process start info.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.BaseAgentRuntime.ResolveExecutable(System.String)
member.summary: Resolve a PATH-based executable name to a concrete Windows-friendly launcher when needed. npm-installed CLIs on Windows often expose .cmd wrappers that must be launched directly when UseShellExecute=false.

member.name: T:Armada.Runtimes.ClaudeCodeRuntime
member.summary: Agent runtime adapter for Anthropic Claude Code CLI.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.ClaudeCodeRuntime.Name
member.summary: Runtime display name.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.ClaudeCodeRuntime.SupportsResume
member.summary: Claude Code supports session resume.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.ClaudeCodeRuntime.ExecutablePath
member.summary: Path to the claude CLI executable.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.ClaudeCodeRuntime.SkipPermissions
member.summary: Whether to use --dangerously-skip-permissions flag.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.ClaudeCodeRuntime.#ctor(SyslogLogging.LoggingModule)
member.summary: Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.ClaudeCodeRuntime.GetCommand
member.summary: Get the claude CLI command.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.ClaudeCodeRuntime.BuildArguments(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Build Claude Code CLI arguments.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.ClaudeCodeRuntime.ApplyEnvironment(System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo)
member.summary: Apply Claude Code specific environment variables.

member.name: T:Armada.Runtimes.CodexRuntime
member.summary: Agent runtime adapter for OpenAI Codex CLI.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.CodexRuntime.Name
member.summary: Runtime display name.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.CodexRuntime.SupportsResume
member.summary: Codex does not support session resume.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.CodexRuntime.ExecutablePath
member.summary: Path to the codex CLI executable.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.CodexRuntime.ApprovalMode
member.summary: Approval mode for codex operations.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.CodexRuntime.#ctor(SyslogLogging.LoggingModule)
member.summary: Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.CodexRuntime.GetCommand
member.summary: Get the codex CLI command.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.CodexRuntime.BuildArguments(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Build Codex CLI arguments.

member.name: T:Armada.Runtimes.CursorRuntime
member.summary: Agent runtime adapter for Cursor agent CLI.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.CursorRuntime.Name
member.summary: Runtime display name.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.CursorRuntime.SupportsResume
member.summary: Cursor does not support session resume.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.CursorRuntime.ExecutablePath
member.summary: Path to the cursor CLI executable.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.CursorRuntime.#ctor(SyslogLogging.LoggingModule)
member.summary: Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.CursorRuntime.GetCommand
member.summary: Get the cursor CLI command.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.CursorRuntime.BuildArguments(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Build Cursor agent CLI arguments.

member.name: T:Armada.Runtimes.GeminiRuntime
member.summary: Agent runtime adapter for Google Gemini CLI.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.GeminiRuntime.Name
member.summary: Runtime display name.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.GeminiRuntime.SupportsResume
member.summary: Gemini CLI does not support session resume.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.GeminiRuntime.ExecutablePath
member.summary: Path to the gemini CLI executable.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.GeminiRuntime.ApprovalMode
member.summary: Approval mode for Gemini operations. Current CLI values include default, auto_edit, yolo, and plan.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.GeminiRuntime.#ctor(SyslogLogging.LoggingModule)
member.summary: Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.GeminiRuntime.GetCommand
member.summary: Get the gemini CLI command.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.GeminiRuntime.BuildArguments(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Build Gemini CLI arguments.

member.name: T:Armada.Runtimes.Interfaces.IAgentRuntime
member.summary: Interface for agent runtime adapters.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.Interfaces.IAgentRuntime.Name
member.summary: Runtime display name.

member.name: P:Armada.Runtimes.Interfaces.IAgentRuntime.SupportsResume
member.summary: Whether this runtime supports session resume.

member.name: E:Armada.Runtimes.Interfaces.IAgentRuntime.OnOutputReceived
member.summary: Event raised when the agent writes a line to stdout. The int parameter is the process ID, the string is the output line.

member.name: E:Armada.Runtimes.Interfaces.IAgentRuntime.OnProcessStarted
member.summary: Event raised immediately after the agent process starts and a PID is available.

member.name: E:Armada.Runtimes.Interfaces.IAgentRuntime.OnProcessExited
member.summary: Event raised when the agent process exits. Parameters: processId, exitCode (null if unavailable).

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.Interfaces.IAgentRuntime.StartAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start an agent process with the given prompt in the specified working directory. Returns the process ID.
member.param: Optional path to write agent output log.
Optional path to write the agent's final response artifact.
member.returns: Process ID of the started agent.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.Interfaces.IAgentRuntime.StopAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stop an agent process gracefully.

member.name: M:Armada.Runtimes.Interfaces.IAgentRuntime.IsRunningAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if an agent process is still running.
member.returns: True if the process is running.
